architectureDecision.label: Dual-worktree automated test
architectureDecision.rationale: Integration test with two git worktrees (publish on A, fetch/hydrate on B) satisfies two-machine convergence AC; physical laptops optional spot-check.

readyReview.decision: Dual-worktree automated test is required evidence; manual two-laptop checklist is optional.

technicalBreakdown: Add integration tests for planning publisher + applier round-trip.
Add dual-worktree hydrate test: worktree A publishes catalog edit; worktree B fetch + hydrate matches.
Add hydrate golden test with mixed task and planning stream.
Run pnpm test and extension test suite; attach CI/local test output to task notes.

acceptanceCriteria: Root unit tests and extension tests pass.
Automated dual-worktree test proves catalog and workspace status converge after fetch + hydrate (physical laptops not required).
No regression in existing task publish/hydrate/conflict scenarios.
Test output summary or CI run reference recorded in task completion notes.
